ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Insert (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Insert (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Insert (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using INSERT OR REPLACE with one data column (replaces entire row).
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Replace (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using INSERT OR REPLACE with two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Replace (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using INSERT OR REPLACE with three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Replace (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Conflict (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Conflict (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE for three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite Upsert Conflict (3 Columns)
